data.content: Approved in implementation review. AgentHistoryView now tracks selectedSessionId, renders a conversation selector for multi-session beats, and passes the selected session into HistoryDebugPanel instead of always binding to sessions[0], which satisfies the requirement to debug the user-selected conversation from history. The added integration coverage verifies selector rendering and that the debug panel binds to the selected session. Sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-foolery-70ec: bun run lint (existing warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
